app.title: Show HN: HTMLDrive – serve HTML files from your Google Drive
app.author: debamitro
app.description: a tool that allows users to share web pages via a link to Google Drive
proposed_tests: Install HtmlDrive and test serving a webpage
Serve a test HTML file and verify URL
Test uploading a new webpage and sharing as a link
